title: Kingdom Hearts to have deep dive at D23 with big announcements about the future of the saga
summary: Disney and Square Enix schedule a special panel for the next D23 convention, fueling fans' hopes for news about Kingdom Hearts 4.

title: Black Ops 1 and 2 ports on PlayStation arrive with criticism for their poor value and plague of cheaters
summary: The PS4 and PS5 versions of the classic Call of Duty titles disappoint critics by offering minimal improvements and lacking protection against hackers, despite leading sales charts.

title: Square Enix announces Octopath Traveler 1 and 2 for Switch 2 but sparks controversy by not offering a free upgrade
summary: The enhanced versions for Nintendo's new console arrive with better graphics and performance, but original owners will have to pay full price again.

title: Games Done Quick cancels its event sponsored by SNK following criticism over its Saudi Arabian ties
summary: The charity organization raises $2.4 million but backs out of the collaboration with the company due to the Saudi ownership of the studio, calling it an oversight they deeply regret.

title: Failed launch of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced triggers crisis at Ubisoft with criticism and labor protests
summary: The game turned out to be unplayable without connecting to Ubisoft servers despite promising otherwise, sparking complaints from the works council about layoffs and forcing the company to reverse its controversial stance on microtransactions.

title: Palworld dominates its 1.0 launch with massive player peak and flood of game guides
summary: The survival and creature-capturing title overtakes giants like Dota 2 on Steam, exceeding 900,000 concurrent players and triggering a mass publication of tutorials.

title: EA removes microtransactions from College Football 27 after enormous pressure from the player community
summary: The company yields to massive backlash and reverses the controversial implementation of microtransactions in its college sports simulator.

title: The Outer Worlds 2 director defends Obsidian amid massive wave of layoffs at Xbox
summary: In an extremely difficult week, the game's director assures that the creative DNA of the company's classics like New Vegas remains intact despite the loss of talent.

title: Gerard Way, My Chemical Romance vocalist, stops his concert to confess he hasn't played Baldur's Gate 3
summary: The singer provokes an amused reaction from Larian Studios and the RPG community by asking his audience if he should try the successful fantasy RPG.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2 developers talk about the fast travel twist and surprise at players' creativity with outfits
summary: Capcom seeks to regain the trust of RPG series fans with the upcoming Dark Arisen DLC, while expressing surprise at the community's enthusiasm for character customization.

title: Xbox faces a week of heavy criticism over cancellations, layoffs, and the precarious situation of its studios
summary: The announcement of the cancellation of a Halo multiplayer project, fan requests to stop the layoff bloodshed, and an independent studio looking for work mark the company's difficult agenda.

title: Rockstar grabs headlines amid petitions for a GTA 4 Remaster, GTA 6 price controversy, and harsh crunch allegations
summary: The actor of Roman Bellic joins the remaster requests, an analyst argues that GTA 6 should cost $200, and a former employee details the extreme working conditions at the company.

title: Nintendo and Lego to launch a recreation of the iconic Donkey Kong arcade machine for $200
summary: A new Lego set based on the classic 80s arcade game is leaked as the next big release from the successful collaboration between both companies.

title: New open-world game, considered the spiritual successor to Bully, announces its release date
summary: While Rockstar confirms it has no plans for Bully 2, an independent team promises a high school-set title to relive school nightmares.

title: Aerial_Knight's MrFreezy, a peculiar puzzle game about a serial killer, announced for PC
summary: The title offers a fun and absorbing head-chopping challenge that promises to become an addictive pastime for puzzle lovers.

title: Konami to add classic Panic Bomber W to Super Bomberman R 2 in a free update on August 20
summary: The Japanese company will expand the content of its successful title with this popular Bomberman series spin-off at no extra cost to players.

title: Former MindsEye developers protest a fan playtest organized by their own company after layoffs
summary: The unionized former employees of Build A Rocket Boy describe the event as a kick in the teeth for laid-off workers and denounce the management's lack of sensitivity.

title: Persona 3 celebrates its 20th anniversary with a new music video and ranking of its most beloved and hated characters
summary: Atlus releases a commemorative video with remixed music and pixel art, while the community passionately debates the best and worst members of S.E.E.S.

title: Warframe creative director calls the end of Destiny 2 tragic and blames executive pressure in the industry
summary: The veteran developer laments that, despite the hard work of studios, the business side of the industry always ends up having the final say.

title: ZeniMax assures that mass layoffs will not mean the end of The Elder Scrolls Online
summary: The developers try to calm the community by stating that the core team remains the same size as when they created the most fan-acclaimed expansions.
